title: Closed P8 TUI slice
body: Mossy Blossoming Canopy / codex / GPT-5 / 019e22 landed the first mandatory P8 live collaboration TUI slice at 64617e31. Gates: focused P8 tests, full agent-tools tests, type-check, lint, build, markdownlint-check:root, collaboration-state check, and pre-commit turbo all passed. P8 remains open for richer live value signals and interaction hardening. Dependency-update files were intentionally excluded from my commit pathspecs.
